ddt:Target.Name: TCU_GEN2_3G_DAI_V2.5
ddt:Target.Description:
History :
02/04/2021 V2.5 Update Auto ID for SW I7.1.2 (SW only for Chiana, Mexic, Taiwan)
4/08/2018 V2.4[Sheela Hariharan] update in DID $6D4A to inlucde bit4
13/07/2018 V2.3 Update Auto ID for SW I8.1 Scrren TCU configuration 2: added a new DID - "Untrusted URL"
21/11/2016 V2.2 Screen TCU configuration 1: Add Refuse To Sleep Timer.
14/11/2016 V2.1 Update Auto ID; Add the screen "Session management"; Update the IO control "TCU time" and DID Default TCU time; Screen TCU configuration 1: delete Mute by CAN; Screen EV Daimler certificate: delete "timeout CANM status".
28/06/2016 v2.0 Changed data byte position for DRX mode duration
30/03/2016 v1.0 Updated for Daimler (Started from TCU_GEN2_v3.2) Compliant with DTS v6.1.2.2
******************************************************* ******************************************************* Mise à jour : 15/10/12 Base DiagONCAN TCU version 1.1
Mise à jour : 23/11/12 Base DiagONCAN TCU version 1.2
Mise à jour : 23.03.2013 Base DiagONCANTCU GEN2 version 1.3
Authors : El-Hadi BELKACEM (Tel : 55 368) / Diego Gil Vazquez (Tel. 0034 986 900 300 ext. 460) Project :L38VEK, X82, X07, X62, 15/40 Correction syntaxe données, Supression de DTC Ajout requête : ouverture de session reprogrammation 1085
Mise à jour 30.05.2013 Base DiagONCANTCU GEN2 version 1.4
Mise à jour 18.06.2013 Base DiagONCANTCU GEN2 version 1.5
Mise à jour 28.06.2013 Base DiagONCANTCU GEN2 version 1.6
Mise à jour 06.08.2013 Base DiagONCANTCU GEN2 version 1.7 - 6C6D not official - 6D16 / 6D17 resized to 2 byte - Screen: Daimler ID added. Current and voltage status SST ERASED SIM parameters update - Routines: SIM Status and GSM Network updated - IO Control : $0A erased
Mise à jour 04.09.2013 Base DiagONCANTCU GEN2 version 1.8 - AutoIddent for D4 defined -DTC devices updated: $AE2462 $93891n - Screen update Part number Renault added
Mise à jour 04.11.2013 Base DiagONCANTCU GEN2 version 1.9 - Screens CANV CANM update - Added TCU Status - Screens for SIM and GSM routines updated
Mise à jour 04.11.2013 Base DiagONCANTCU GEN2 version 2.0 - Added DIDs for CCS: $6D30, $6D31 and $6D32 - Screen Service Activation modificated, included CCS reading
06/11/2015 v3.2 Updated for EV/Daimler/China/Brazil variants
03/07/2018 v2.3 Addition of DID $6DEC(Untrusted URL)

Item.Text: Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level oor/ zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect

List.Item: Response to control status when test in progress
Response to control status when test in progress

Item.Text: Time synchronisation with server 1 (GDC) activated, and with GPS if no service on Server 1 (GDC) is active
Time synchronisation with server 1 (GDC), with GPS or PLGW

Data.Name: MFD NFA definition
Data.Description: Configuration of USB connection to NFA or MFD or de-actived;

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ClearDiagnosticInformation.All
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: ExtendedDiagnosticSession
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request for old ECU

Screen.Name: SEND ALL THE DATAS TO THE GDC SERVER- FULL CHECK&SMS

Label.Text: SEND ALL THE DATAS TO THE GDC SERVER
NOTE: This Routine is for full communication chain, including SMS reception check

Screen.Name: - CHECK GLOBAL CONNECTION WITH GDC-PING CHECK

Label.Text: NOTE: It is present as "TEST SEQUENCE SMS CHANNEL" in DCR25
NOTE: This Routine is only to make "PING" to GDC and NO SMS reception

Label.Text: - Hard Reset : Simulates TCU power ON
- Key OFF ON Reset : Used in factory
- Soft Reset : restart the application without reinitializing previously learned configuration data
- Configuration Reset : Reset configuration parameters to default values

Button.Text: Write Vehicle Manufacturer Spare Part Number
Read Vehicle Manufacturer Spare Part Number

Label.Text: Hours that TCU will be in DRX mode

Input.DataName: DRX mode duration.Hours the TCU will be on DRX mode

Display.DataName: DRX mode duration.Hours the TCU will be on DRX mode

Label.Text: Charge spot finder upgrade 3 to 24 spots
GBA : Inhibition/disinhibition of charge if customer
GBA : Battery usage & charge history = Health Certificate update 2012
Low battery alert upgrade on remote Phone
Charge spot finder upgrade availability + compatibility
Create private charge spot off board & download in my car over the air
LIVE services : All Tomtom LIVE services
